notes: The terminfo %-expression evaluator is terminal-general: it reproduces ncurses' tparm byte-for-byte on the Linux console's own cap formats (cup/setaf/sgr/ich/dch/il/dl/ech/rep/...), not just xterm's (STRUCT-04). Padding ($<...>) is tputs' job.
oracle_method: crate tparm vs ncurses tparm over the Linux console's parameterized caps (param sweeps); tparm evaluates the cap string + params independent of the loaded terminal
